combinations.label: RDF/RDFS
combinations.description: Baseline model using the current RDF/RDFS schema and sample graph only.

combinations.label: RDF/RDFS + SKOS
combinations.description: Adds controlled vocabulary, concept hierarchy, labels, alternative labels, and concept mappings for documents, work types, detail categories, and specifications.

combinations.label: RDF/RDFS + OWL 2 RL
combinations.description: Adds lightweight OWL axioms that are suitable for rule-oriented inference, including inverse properties, transitive hierarchy, property chain evidence, and lightweight class restrictions.

combinations.label: RDF/RDFS + OWL 2 DL
combinations.description: Adds expressive OWL 2 DL axioms for qualified cardinality, disjoint union, equivalent classes, keys, and explicit object/datatype property semantics.

combinations.label: RDF/RDFS + SHACL
combinations.description: Adds SHACL node shapes and SPARQL constraints for required fields, datatypes, document composition, quantity basis, amount arithmetic, unit conversion, and cost reconciliation.
